creator: fmysh@iijmio-mail.jp
text:
Update mecab-ipadic to 2.7.0-20070801.

	The name and version constructions for the port are changed
	as follows:
	    PKGNAMESUFFIX is used for the name of a dictionary.
	    The usage for DISTVERSION is corrected.
	Make += assignments be used for CONFIGURE_ARGS.
	Make configure respect PREFIX for dicdir.
	Typo. s/sjis_jis/shift_jis/g.
